_comment: Starter vocabulary pack. Deliberately small per IMPLEMENTATION.md (Phase 2 grows this from real session evidence). Calibrated to darktable 5.4.1. v1.6.0: removed expo_+0.5 / expo_-0.5 — replaced by the parameterized 'exposure' entry in expressive-baseline (RFC-021 / ADR-077..080).

entries.name: look_neutral
entries.description: Neutral L2 look — exposure + warm-subtle WB baseline.
